name: thread-mcp
description: Thread MCP server — exposes Gmail inbox, approval queue, calendar, and agent tools for AI assistants via the Model Context Protocol.

auth.note: Option A: jwt + jwt_refresh cookies from Thread sign-in. Option B: Authorization: Bearer <THREAD_MCP_API_KEY> — must match THREAD_MCP_USER_ID env (scoped; no arbitrary X-Thread-User-Id).

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Retrieve a full Gmail thread including all messages

tools.name: approve_queue_item
tools.description: Approve a pending queue item (sends email / creates calendar event)

tools.name: rank_inbox
tools.description: Rank inbox threads by AI urgency

tools.name: list_calendar_events
tools.description: List Google Calendar events in a date range

tools.name: queue_email
tools.description: Queue an email for human approval (send cap: 3/min)

tools.name: queue_calendar_invite
tools.description: Queue a calendar invite for human approval (supports recurrence RRULE)

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List Gmail labels (use before apply_label / remove_label)

tools.name: apply_label
tools.description: Apply a Gmail label to a thread

tools.name: remove_label
tools.description: Remove a Gmail label from a thread

examples.description: List 10 most recent inbox threads (API key auth)

arguments.subject: Follow up
arguments.body: Hello — following up on our chat.
